summary: Blog post celebrating jockey Michelle Payne as the first woman to win the Melbourne Cup in the race's 155-year history.
Customer testimonial from Lisa in England describing how Cavallo boots help manage her mare's recurring hoof canker by keeping the foot dry and medicated.
Educational post explaining how each hoof's frog acts as a blood pump, giving rise to the saying a horse has five hearts, and arguing barefoot/hoof boots aid circulation.
Carole Herder's travel blog about visiting Ireland, including an interview with equine therapist Niamh Fitzpatrick on Masterson Method and navicular recovery.
Carole Herder recounts overhearing a trade-show conversation about leaving a horse barefoot versus shoeing for trail work, advocating Cavallo hoof boots instead of metal shoes.
Motivational post on courage and overcoming fear in riding and in business, drawing on Carole Herder's experience founding Cavallo.
Holiday-themed post listing Carole Herder's top ten horse films, with a nod to shopping the Cavallo store for gift ideas.
Travel feature on Discovery Horse Tours in Jaco, Costa Rica, offering barefoot, bitless rainforest and beach rides on rescued horses.
Light-hearted post on being addicted to horses, pivoting to introduce the affordable Cavallo ELB (Entry Level Boot) at $49.95 for barefoot transition and rehab.
Barefoot hoof-care guide covering common transition issues: irregular trims, diet, mineral balance, lack of movement, and soft pasture.
Post on the physical and psychological health benefits of horse riding, citing a 2011 British Horse Society study linking riding to well-being.
New Year listicle of 5 ways to improve your riding in 2016 (lessons, competitive trail riding, equilates, potassium, courses) plus tips to benefit your horse.
